title: Vanilla Nick
description: A minimalistic, vanilla friendly custom nick datapack.
body:
# Custom Nicknames

Getting tired of using your regular username but want to keep it vanilla? Looking to roleplay with other names? Look no further.

This datapack adds a new command that allows you to change your nickname. Just get a book and quill, write your new name in it, sign it, run the command and voila! Your brand new name is now done.

# Usage
To get started, write your name in a book and quill like this:
!["My New Name" written in a book and quill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39e59dd71d1311750bed5a0c853f1a64dae9bbdf.png)

Sign it with any name, then run the following command:

```
/trigger ChangeNick
```

After successfully triggering that command, run the following command to activate your new nick:


```
/trigger ActivateNick
```

Your nickname will now appear in tab, like this:

![An image showing the tab menu with the new nickname. Regular name is still written in (parentheses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8981947eac94bcb7066cc0b0c07abdade67c15c.png)

To turn your nickname off, use the following command:

```
/trigger DeactivateNick
```
